title: Line following transporter
description: Developed a portable, autonomous line follower transporter for industrial/warehouse logistics. Achieved 90% path-following accuracy under varying light conditions.

title: Line Follower
description: Developed an autonomous line follower robot that ensures stable path-tracking across complex track conditions.

title: Finger-based object detection to help understand sign language
description: Developed a real-time finger detection framework that precisely translates various hand gestures for sign language understanding.

title: Development of an Autonomous SAR Robot for Victim Detection Across Various Obstacles in KRSRI
description: Developed an autonomous SAR robot capable of navigating complex obstacles and reliably detecting victims for the KRSRI competition.

title: Kinematic Analysis of a Hiwonder-Based Hexapod Robot
description: Analyzed the kinematics of a Hiwonder hexapod robot to ensure precise foot placement and stable navigation across various structural obstacles.

title: Smart Parking Vehicle Locator System using Automatic Number Plate Recognition
description: Engineered an ANPR-based smart parking system designed to automate vehicle localization and enhance parking lot navigation.

title: Stair-climbing robot
description: Developed an autonomous stair-climbing robot designed to maintain balance and achieve smooth navigation across vertical obstacles.

title: Automatic water level control system using PID control
description: Developed an automatic water level control system using PID control to maintain precise fluid volume and eliminate fluid oscillation.

title: Design and Development of a Touch-Controlled Automatic Smart Bin Using Assembly Language
description: Designed and developed a touch-controlled automatic smart bin, utilizing low-level Assembly Language for optimized hardware response and efficient power management.
